docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY P.W. STEPHENS ENVIRONMENTAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PENNING, LORETTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
